caption: The video appears to be an educational or informational presentation on a rural community food system, specifically focusing on "13R Retailers willing to source local & Product Cost/Price." The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is seen in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and speaking. The main content of the video is displayed on a webpage titled "Rural Community Food System," which includes text explaining how retailers sourcing local products can increase availability, lower product costs, and support local consumption. A visual diagram on the right side of the screen illustrates various interconnected elements of the food system, with arrows indicating relationships between different components such as retailers, product cost, price, and local consumption. As the video progresses, the diagram expands to show a more complex network of interactions, highlighting the reinforcing growth cycle within the retail food system cluster. The overall aim seems to be to demonstrate the benefits and dynamics of local sourcing for retailers and communities.
